---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: 'feat: '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Summary

A brief description of the feature you'd like to see.

## Motivation

Why do you need this feature? What problem does it solve?

## Proposed solution

Describe how you'd like the feature to work. Include API sketches if possible.

## Alternatives considered

Are there other approaches you've considered? Why is this one preferred?

## Additional context

Any other context, references, or screenshots.
